title: Incremental Programming Game
subtitle: Learn Python through short runs, tasks, and unlocks.
taskAfterCommandsMessage: {count} more drops until the next task.
challengeActiveMessage: Solve the current task to continue.
allTasksCompletedMessage: All current prototype tasks are solved.
runPanelRunningMessage: Balls are moving through the board...
editorLockedDescription: Editing unlocks after two correct task answers. Until then, the game runs drop_ball() for you.
editorUnlockedDescription: You can now edit your program. Use drop_ball() and, later, set_aim(...) to guide balls into the board.
helperEditorLockedDescription: Helper functions unlock later in the shop.
helperEditorUnlockedDescription: Write one reusable strategy here and call it from the main program.
programReadyMessage: Valid program. This run will launch {count} ball(s).
helperProgramReadyMessage: The helper function is ready to use.
programErrorEmpty: Your program is empty. Add at least one drop_ball().
programErrorTooManyLines: Too many non-empty lines. Current limit is {limit}.
programErrorInvalidLine: Line {line}: this line is not valid yet.
programErrorUnsupportedForLoop: Line {line}: only for _ in range(N): is unlocked right now.
programErrorForRangeLimit: Line {line}: range() must stay between 1 and {max}.
programErrorForBodyRequired: Line {line}: add at least one indented line under this block.
programErrorInvalidForBody: Line {line}: this line is not allowed inside the current for-loop body.
programErrorNestedBlocks: Line {line}: nested blocks are not unlocked yet.
programErrorUnexpectedIndentation: Line {line}: this indented line needs a supported block above it.
programErrorStepLimitExceeded: This program would launch too many balls at once. The current limit is {max}.
programErrorInvalidExpression: Line {line}: this expression is not valid.
programErrorInvalidCondition: Line {line}: this condition is not valid.
programErrorInvalidSetAim: Line {line}: set_aim(...) needs one numeric expression.
programErrorAimRangeLimit: Line {line}: set_aim(...) must stay between 1 and 3.
programErrorInvalidFunctionDefinition: Line {line}: helper functions must use def name(): in the helper editor.
programErrorDuplicateFunction: Line {line}: helper function {name} is already defined.
programErrorHelperLimitExceeded: You can define up to {limit} helper function right now.
programErrorHelperLineLimitExceeded: The helper function can use up to {limit} non-empty lines right now.
programErrorHelperNotDefined: Line {line}: helper function {name} does not exist yet.
programZeroStepMessage: Valid program, but it currently launches 0 balls. Change the logic or run once to reroll bonus_lane.
runBlockedInvalidProgram: Fix the program before running it again.
activityFeedEmpty: Completed tasks, unlocks, and purchases will appear here.
feedRunHint: Run the program to make progress.
feedEditorUnlocked: Unlocked editing for the main program.
feedLineUnlocked: Unlocked a new line. Capacity is now {lines}.
tutorialRunMessage: Click Run program to release balls into the board. After enough resolved drops, your first task will appear.
tutorialChallengeMessage: Tasks appear after enough resolved drops. Solve the current one before you continue.
tutorialEditorMessage: You now have 2 lines. Try copying drop_ball() onto the second line.
editorUnlockOneTaskMessage: Solve 1 more task to unlock editing.
editorUnlockManyTasksMessage: Solve {count} more tasks to unlock editing.
shopSubtitle: Unlock real Python ideas that change how the board behaves.
shopAvailableHint: Earn more points to buy this upgrade.
availableStructuresEmpty: No Python structures are unlocked yet.
availableSyntaxStepLimit: Up to {limit} balls can be launched in one run.
boardSubtitle: Points come from the bucket value plus the current bonus lane.
